text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 5. Token based auth with Spring Security
A powerful, highly customizable authentication and access-control framework.
It works through a Filter Chain—a series of "checkpoints" that every request must
pass through before hitting your Controller.
The final destination where roles are strictly enforced.
This is where we wire everything together
and define who can access what.
This is the part that was missing. It connects Spring Security to your Database.
This runs for every request to check for a valid token in the header.
